rules.rule: Preserve explicit occasion values already represented in the projection.
Assign to the bread specialty when completed scratch score S >= 70.
Assign to walk-in pastry, doughnut, cake, or gluten-free/vegan bakery records with a completed scratch score.
Assign to pie, cookie/sweet, cake, or regional-specialty records when completed combined score G >= 55.
Assign when completed combined score G >= 70, the strongest practical score band in this snapshot.
Retain explicit rare finds and add only named scarce regional items documented in accepted decision text.
Leave empty when none of the evidence-backed suitability rules apply.
